criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across different platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration in features such as recommendations, personalization, and content discovery.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Content Variety
criteria.description: Diversity and quantity of content available on the platform.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, content libraries

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Average time spent by users on the app and frequency of use.

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of premium subscriptions and value for money.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and overall user experience.

criteria.name: Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality of content including resolution, sound quality, and exclusivity.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, content libraries
